introLines.text: Vern, I've been driving trucks for twenty-two years. Last night I saw something that shook me to my core.
Long-haul driver here. I've seen every kind of weather, every kind of aircraft. This wasn't any of those.
I'm calling from a rest stop because I can't keep driving. What I saw an hour ago... I need to talk about it.

detailLines.text: Triangular shape, three lights at each point. Moved over my rig at maybe 200 feet. Silent. Completely silent.
It paced my truck for about two miles. Same speed, same direction. Then it just... accelerated and was gone.
I had my CB on. Two other truckers on the same stretch saw it. We all pulled over. We're all shaken.

defenseLines.text: I know aircraft, Vern. I've been around military bases, I've seen experimental jets. This was different.
I'm a professional driver. My livelihood depends on being alert and aware. I wasn't hallucinating.
Three independent witnesses, all on CB radio at the same time. You can't fake that.

acceptanceLines.text: Thank you. My dispatcher didn't believe me. Thought I was tired. I'm not tired, Vern.
That means a lot. I've been driving this route for years. Never thought I'd make this kind of call.
I knew you'd understand. That's why I called your show.

extraDetailLines.text: Here's the thing - my dash cam was running. Got about forty seconds of footage. Lights are clear as day.
One of the other drivers, he's been on the road thirty years. He said he's never seen anything like it. And he's seen a lot.
When it accelerated, there was no sound, no sonic boom. It just... left. Faster than anything I've ever seen.

conclusionLines.text: I'll try to send you that dash cam footage. People need to see this.
Thanks Vern. I'm gonna try to finish my route. Keep doing what you do.
I'll be watching the skies from now on. Got your station saved. Appreciate you.
